calendar.matters:
Petition For Approval Of Settlement
Off Calendar Jun-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-23-2009 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2009 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2009 Continued To Mar-23-09 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 306

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgement On The Pleadings.
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for Ruth Lewis. Frederic Campagnoli for John Miguel and Rosita Carey (Respondents).

Mr. Bassi reported that the matter had not settled and stated that he had no objection to the tentative. The Court explained to Mr. Campagnoli that no defenses were stated for the second and third causes of action. The Court ruled as follows: 1. As to the amended petition filed by Ruth Lewis to: (1) Compel an Account and Report; (2) Remove Co-Trustees and Compel Co-Trustees to Redress Breach of Trust; and (3) Name Petitioner Ruth Lewis as successor trustee - Granted. 2. As to Respondents John Rey Miguel and Rosita Miguel Carey's response:
*pertaining to the cause of action to Compel and Account & Report - granted without leave to amend. *pertaining to the cause of action for Removal of Trustee - granted with 30 days leave to amend. *pertaining to the cause of action to name Petitioner Ruth Lewis as successor trustee - granted with 30 days leave to amend. The parties agreed to 20 days leave to amend, which the Court allowed. Mr. Campagnoli's response/opposition is due by March 17, 2009. Mr. Bassi is to prepare the order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Jackson.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Jackie Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy D. Murphy.

Petition To Compel Report And Account From Co-Trustees
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Continued To Nov-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi for and with Ruth Lewis. Fred Campagnoli for John Miguel and Rose Carey (Respondents).

Mr. Bassi stated that the oppostion had not been verified and requested the petition be granted as to the appointment of Ms. Lewis and the removal of the current two Trustees. In addition, he requested the matter be set for trial as he believed an accounting could not be provided due to co-mingling of the trust assets and the corporate assets. The Court gave Mr. Campagnoli the opportunity to have his clients verify the opposition. Mr. Campagnoli agreed that the matter should proceed to trial and stated that he would have the verification within 10 days. Status on filing of the verification of the opposition was set for November 3, 2008. No appearance is needed if the verification is filed by that date and the Court will sign the order referring the matter to the department of the Presiding Judge.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

Petitioner Ruth Lewis' Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, For Award Of Monetary Sanctions And For Order Imposing Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Petitioner Ruth Lewis' motion to compel responses to request for production of documents and for monetary or terminating sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. No opposition has been filed. The motion for terminating sanctions is denied. The motion to compel responses to request for production of documents (#4, 5, 6) and for monetary sanctions is granted. Respondent is ordered to serve verified responses without objections and produce documents within 15 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,890 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
